message:
test: add obligation limit, gap-too-large, and allocation counting guard tests

- region.rs: add `region_obligation_limit_released_after_resolve` test
  verifying that obligation slots are correctly freed after resolve,
  allowing re-reservation up to the configured max_obligations limit;
  refactor overflow assertion from match-arm to expect_err + if-let for
  clarity
- aggregator.rs: change gap-too-large behavior from silent drop to
  advancing next_expected and delivering the symbol, preventing
  indefinite stalls when sequence gaps exceed max_sequence_gap; add
  `test_reorderer_gap_too_large_advances` test; refactor path-exists
  assertion from else-panic to assert_with_log
- cache_aware_queues.rs: add ALLOC_COUNTING_ENABLED gate so the
  counting allocator only tracks allocations during measured regions;
  add AllocCountingGuard RAII type and `measure_allocs` helper for
  precise allocation measurement within test closures

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
